candidate_problem_record.subject: physics
candidate_problem_record.raw_question_text: A simple pendulum is attached to a support which is driven horizontally with time as shown in Fig. 2.25. Set up the Lagrangian for the system in terms of the generalized coordinates $\theta$ and $y$, where $\theta$ is the angular displacement from equilibrium and $y(t)$ is the horizontal position of the pendulum support. (Wisconsin)
candidate_problem_record.multi_solution_policy_rationale: 该数据集保留多解潜力评估，但不默认强推多解 agent。
